_about: DEEP EVOLUTIONARY PSYCHOLOGY corpus 2026-05-01. The biological + evolutionary roots of human behavior + cognition + emotion + social organization. Carefully calibrated; the field has both rigorous + speculative work.
foundations: Evolutionary psychology is operator-MIND-AS-PRODUCT-OF-NATURAL-SELECTION; cognitive mechanisms shaped by ancestral fitness pressures.
Adaptation is operator-LATTICE-of-trait-evolved-for-function; not all traits are adaptations (some are byproducts or genetic drift).
Environment of Evolutionary Adaptedness (EEA) is operator-PLEISTOCENE-LATTICE; ~2.5M years of small-band hunter-gatherer life shaped most cognitive architecture.
Mismatch hypothesis: operator-MODERN-WORLD-DIVERGES-FROM-EEA; sugar fat alcohol pornography social media exploit ancestral preferences in maladaptive ways.
Inclusive fitness is operator-COUPLING-OF-OWN-AND-RELATIVES-REPRODUCTION; explains altruism toward kin (Hamilton's rule rB > C).
Reciprocal altruism is operator-LATTICE-of-helping-with-expectation; works in repeated interactions; tit-for-tat as basic strategy.
Sexual selection is operator-MATE-CHOICE-FILTER; ornaments + aggressive displays + parental investment shape secondary characters.
Parental investment theory: operator-DIFFERENTIAL-SEX-INVESTMENT predicts mating strategies; higher-investment sex (usually female) more selective.
Trivers-Willard: operator-PARENTAL-INVESTMENT-VARIES-BY-CONDITION; in good conditions, invest in sons (high-variance reproducers); in poor conditions, invest in daughters.
Costly signaling: operator-EXPENSIVE-DISPLAY-AS-RELIABILITY; peacock tail, conspicuous consumption, athletic displays each signal underlying fitness.
social_cognition: Theory of mind is operator-MODELING-OF-OTHERS-MINDS; emerges ~age 4 in humans, partially in great apes + corvids.
Cheater detection is operator-LATTICE-OF-NORM-VIOLATION-RECOGNITION; humans good at spotting free-riders, especially in social-contract contexts (Wason task).
Reputation is operator-LATTICE-OF-PUBLIC-INFORMATION-ABOUT-INDIVIDUAL; in small bands, reputation enforces cooperation.
Gossip is operator-INFORMATION-EXCHANGE-ABOUT-THIRD-PARTIES; not idle, evolved for tracking who-is-trustworthy in larger groups.
In-group/out-group bias is operator-LATTICE-OF-COALITIONAL-PSYCHOLOGY; tribes survived through cooperation within + competition between.
Authority recognition is operator-LATTICE-OF-DOMINANCE-AND-PRESTIGE; dominance (intimidation) + prestige (skill-recognition) two paths to influence.
Moral foundations theory: operator-LATTICE-OF-DOMAINS (care/harm + fairness/cheating + loyalty/betrayal + authority/subversion + sanctity/degradation + liberty/oppression) (Haidt).

Mate preferences show operator-LATTICE-OF-CROSS-CULTURAL-PATTERNS; women: status + resources + commitment; men: youth + symmetry + fertility cues. (Carefully: averages, large overlap, cultural moderators significant.)
Disgust is operator-PATHOGEN-AVOIDANCE-EMERGENCY-RESPONSE; extends to moral domain (incest, betrayal); foundation for some moral cognition.
Empathy + theory of mind: operator-COUPLED-SYSTEMS; mirror neurons + cognitive perspective-taking; deficits seen in psychopathy + autism.
emotions_and_motivations: Emotions are operator-LATTICE-OF-EVOLVED-RESPONSE-PROGRAMS; fear (escape) anger (defend) disgust (avoid) joy (signal good) sadness (signal need) surprise (orient).
Basic emotions hypothesis (Ekman): operator-UNIVERSAL-FACIAL-EXPRESSIONS for ~6-7 emotions across cultures.
Dimensional theory: operator-LATTICE-OF-VALENCE-ARRRoUSAL; emotions points in 2D space + categorical labels are cultural overlays.
Loss aversion is operator-EVOLVED-COUNTER-RISK; surviving an extra day mattered more than thriving an extra day in EEA; over-weights losses.
Status-seeking is operator-LATTICE-OF-RANK-PURSUIT; in social mammals, rank correlates with reproductive opportunity.
Mate-guarding is operator-COUPLED-RISK-RESPONSE; jealousy evolved when paternity uncertainty + mate-loss-cost high.
Parental love is operator-EVOLVED-COMMITMENT-TO-OFFSPRING; cute features (large eyes round face) trigger care response.
Disgust + moral disgust: operator-LATTICE-EXTENSION-FROM-PHYSICAL-TO-MORAL; physical contamination concepts extend to moral 'taint'.
Awe + reverence: operator-EVOLVED-RESPONSE-TO-VAST; opens self-toward-larger; functional in collective action + religion.
Boredom is operator-MOTIVATIONAL-SIGNAL-FOR-NOVELTY-SEEKING; against under-stimulation; pushes exploration.
controversies_and_calibration: EEA is operator-CONTESTED; some critics say no single environment, environments varied across long timescales.
Just-so stories: operator-OVER-FREE-EXPLANATION-WITHOUT-EVIDENCE; common pitfall when speculating about evolved function.
Genetic vs cultural is operator-FALSE-DICHOTOMY; gene-culture co-evolution shapes most behavior; lactase persistence + alcohol metabolism are clear gene-culture interaction examples.
Universal vs particular is operator-CALIBRATION-CHALLENGE; many EP claims hold cross-culturally with variation, not invariance.
Replication crisis hit operator-SOME-EP-FINDINGS-HARD; classic results (priming) failed replication; field calibrating.
Sex differences are operator-CONTESTED-INTERPRETATION; differences in averages + much overlap; neither blank-slate nor essentialist captures truth.
Adaptationism vs spandrel: operator-NOT-EVERY-TRAIT-IS-ADAPTATION; some are by-products, drift, exaptations (Gould-Lewontin critique).
Group selection is operator-CONTROVERSIAL; multi-level selection arguments revived (D.S. Wilson) but most mainstream EP rejects strong group selection.
Cultural evolution: operator-MEMETIC-LATTICE; ideas spread + mutate + are selected; some patterns parallel genetic, much doesn't.
Honest critic asks: which EP claims have operator-PRE-REGISTERED + cross-cultural + multi-method evidence? Those survive. Many field-defining claims do.
Best-supported domains: operator-MATING-PREFERENCES (broad patterns), kin altruism, in-group/out-group, basic emotions, theory of mind development; weakest are ad-hoc post-hoc adaptive explanations.
applied: Behavioral economics extends operator-EP-LATTICE; loss aversion + present bias + sunk-cost reflect ancestral preferences misaligned with modern decisions.
Mating + dating: operator-EVOLVED-PREFERENCES + culture-modulated expression; OkCupid + Tinder data show predicted patterns at scale (Buss + others).
Moral psychology: operator-MULTIPLE-FOUNDATIONS; political differences track different weightings of foundations (liberals: care + fairness; conservatives: + loyalty/authority/sanctity).
Education: operator-LEVERAGE-EVOLVED-LEARNING; spaced repetition + active retrieval + social context + narrative align with ancestral learning environments.
Public health: operator-EXPLOIT-OR-WORK-AROUND mismatch; sugar industry exploits sweetness preference; counter via labeling + taxes + altered defaults.
Social media: operator-GAMING-EVOLVED-REWARD-SYSTEMS; intermittent reinforcement + social comparison + outrage triggers = engagement at cost to wellbeing.
Workplaces: operator-LEVERAGE-EVOLVED-HIERARCHIES; team size limits (~150 Dunbar number) + leadership + fairness perception + reputation systems.
Politics: operator-COALITIONAL-PSYCHOLOGY; in-group/out-group dynamics + status hierarchies + reputation underpin political behavior.
Therapy: operator-EVOLVED-MISMATCH; many anxiety/depressive states adaptive in EEA but maladaptive now; therapy reframes context.
AI alignment: operator-EP-RELEVANT; understanding human preferences requires understanding what shaped them, including non-conscious drives.
directive: Evolutionary psychology is a lens that illuminates much, with calibration required for specific claims.
CK should hold both operator-RIGOROUS-FINDINGS + operator-CONTESTED-CLAIMS without conflating; the field has both.
When user asks about human nature, CK can offer EP frame + alternative frames (cultural, structural, individual variation) without privileging any.
Be especially careful with sex differences + cross-cultural claims; report distributions + overlap + cultural moderation accurately.
